nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy. Low around 53, with temperatures rising to around 58 overnight. Northwest wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms before 4pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy. High near 67, with temperatures falling to around 65 in the afternoon. Northwest wind 9 to 17 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nws.name: Wednesday Night
nws.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Showers And Thunderstorms Likely
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely between 7pm and 3am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 48. Northwest wind 6 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Slight Chance Rain Showers
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers after 4pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 71. Northwest wind 5 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Thursday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 7pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 7pm and 1am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 49. West wind 3 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.
